cards.title: Emotional Maturity in Parenting
cards.body: Psychologist Lindsay C Gibson's book on emotionally immature parents became a pandemic bestseller. Her new work offers advice for raising happy, healthy children by breaking cycles of emotional dysfunction.

cards.title: Parenting a Teenager Through A-Levels
cards.body: Holding flashcards for chemistry while your teen does A-levels is uniquely anxiety-inducing. Parents often feel helpless despite their best efforts to support their children's academic journey.

cards.title: Intergenerational Legacy in Fatherhood
cards.body: Fathers launching young adult children must embrace their imperfections rather than hide them. Accepting past and present failures creates a more loving intergenerational legacy.

cards.title: Why Families Need Healthy Space
cards.body: Living apart can bring guilt and sadness, yet healthy distance helps children and parents grow. Love and connection remain intact even when family members aren't physically together.

cards.title: BFRB Treatment in Children
cards.body: Children with hair-pulling or skin-picking disorders don't need to want to stop before treatment begins. Meaningful therapeutic work can start before willingness arrives.

cards.title: Social Media Safety for Kids
cards.body: Ofcom warns that TikTok and YouTube aren't safe enough for children. Both platforms dispute the findings, claiming they have robust safety features in place.
